case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS FRANKWELL INVESTMENT SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $772.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKWELL INVESTMENT SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKWELL INVESTMENT SERVICES INC. $272.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $332.00, DEFT MAKER OF CHECK DID NOT ACT IN BAD FAITH. 3RD PARTY PAYEE WAS NOT ENTITLED TO KEEP FUNDS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKWELL INVESTMENT SERVICES INC.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKWELL INVESTMENT SERVICES INC.

parties.name: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING, CENTER 3451 A EAST 14TH ST. OAKLAND, CA 94601
